name: Frost Buster
additional_info: On critical, create three moderately large ice patches in a linear path in front of yourself. These patches last 1 minute 30 seconds. Despite what the Talent description states, Greathammers do not proc Frost Buster but Greataxes do. Greatcannons do not proc Frost Buster either.
desc: Greatsword Criticals and Greathammer Criticals now leave a place Ice below the path they carve.
